name: Valley Golf Center
about: Valley Golf Center is a family-owned and operated golf facility with over 30 years of experience, offering a golf course experience in a driving range setting along with an 18-hole miniature golf course. The venue features year-round teaching instruction by golf professional Bob Dugan, utilizing high-definition video analysis and FlightScope golf swing technology. For indoor play, they offer a simulator with FlightScope X3 and TruGolf E6 Connect software with over 90 virtual courses available. The facility also provides outdoor driving range with course-like features and a self-service driving range option. Operating hours for the shop and mini golf are 10am till 8pm, with the self-service driving range open 24/7 requiring exact change cash payment.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional instruction with advanced FlightScope X3 swing analysis technology
Year-round indoor simulator access with TruGolf E6 Connect and over 90 virtual courses
Family-friendly environment with both adult and junior pricing options
Natural outdoor setting with target flags and water features on the driving range

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service

simulator_hardware.notes: Radar-based launch monitor with 24 club and ball parameters, used for both instruction and simulation

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly state, but since they offer club rentals and regripping services, they likely have equipment available for those who don't have their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service at the venue, and no restrictions on outside items are specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the duration for 18 holes on the simulator, but typical simulator play ranges from 1-2 hours depending on course complexity and player pace.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Valley Golf Center explicitly markets as family-friendly with special pricing for children (12 & Under) at $5 for mini golf and mentions they offer activities great for all ages.
